put.summary: Update an existing project's queue settings

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: projectQueueSettings
parameters.description:
Specifies the project's scans behavior in the queue.
QueueKeepMode Options: KeepAll, KeepNew, KeepOld.

ScansType Options: All, OnlyIncremental, OnlyFull
Note: • The automatic cancellation of parallel scans affects only public scans and the selected scan type (Full / Incremental / All).

post.summary: Set project's queue settings

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: projectQueueSettings
parameters.description:
Specifies the project's scans behavior in the queue.
QueueKeepMode Options: KeepAll, KeepNew, KeepOld.

ScansType Options: All, OnlyIncremental, OnlyFull
Note: • The automatic cancellation of parallel scans affects only public scans and the selected scan type (Full / Incremental / All).

parameters.description: Specifies the Unique Id of the specific project to be scanned

parameters.name: overrideProjectSetting
parameters.description: Specifies whether to overwrite project settings to be the default for the next scans .If set to false or empty - do not overwrite project settings. If set to true - overwrite project settings

parameters.name: isIncremental
parameters.description: Specifies whether the scan is incremental of full

parameters.name: isPublic
parameters.description: Specifies whether the requested scan is public or private

parameters.name: forceScan
parameters.description: Specifies whether the code should be scanned regardless of unchanged code

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Specifies the scan comment

parameters.name: presetId
parameters.description: Specify the preset id to use during the scan, 0 = use project's default

parameters.name: engineConfigurationId
parameters.description: Specify the engine-configuration to use during the scan, 0 = use project's default

parameters.name: zippedSource
parameters.description: source Zip

numberOfVersionsSinceLastUpdate.description: Number of newer versions (if no newest version exists, then this field will be 0)

confidenceLevel.description: The confidence level about the provided result

matchType.description: The method which was used to match the library: Exact Match / Filename Match

severity.description: Library severity based on highest vulnerability severity

riskScore.description: Library risk score based on highest vulnerability risk score

The Schedule type.
Allowed values are: "None", "Weekly".

scheduledDays.description:
The Schedule days, relevant just in case ScheduleType is "Weekly".type, allowed values are: "None", "Weekly".

scheduleTime.description: The Schedule time in each scheduled days format {HH:MM}.
